tool.name: Phase C.4 merge annotation
tool.description: Merge Liftoff-clean and TOGA2/CESAR2 projections into a unified per-query annotation
tool.command: mkdir -p triage_dir toga_dir out_dir && ln -s '$liftoff_clean' triage_dir/liftoff_clean.gff3 && #if $toga.use_toga == "yes" ln -s '$toga.loss_summary' toga_dir/loss_summary.tsv && ln -s '$toga.orthology' toga_dir/orthology_classification.tsv && #if $toga.query_annotation ln -s '$toga.query_annotation' toga_dir/query_annotation.bed && #end if #if $toga.query_genes ln -s '$toga.query_genes' toga_dir/query_genes.bed && #end if #end if python '$__tool_directory__/phase_c4_merge.py' --query '$query' --triage-dir triage_dir --toga-dir toga_dir --out-dir out_dir --ref-bed '$ref_bed' && cp 'out_dir/${query}.annotation.gff3' '$annotation_gff3' && cp 'out_dir/${query}.classification.tsv' '$classification_tsv'

param.label: Query strain name
param.help: Query strain identifier (e.g. Pk_ANKA). Used only to name the output files; not written into them.

validator.message: Letters, digits, underscore, hyphen, dot only

param.name: liftoff_clean
param.label: Liftoff-clean GFF3
param.help: Triage-accepted Liftoff projection (liftoff_clean.gff3 from Phase C.2). Genes here are tagged source=liftoff, intactness=I.

param.label: Reference gene BED
param.help: Reference annotation in BED (BED12) format; column 4 is the reference gene id. Genes present here but absent from both projections are reported as source=none, intactness=M (missing).

param.name: use_toga
param.label: Include TOGA2/CESAR2 fallback projections
param.help: Decision 12: leave at 'No' for a Liftoff-only pass 1. With 'No' an empty TOGA staging directory is used, so every projected gene is tagged source=liftoff.

param.name: query_genes
param.label: TOGA2 query_genes.bed
param.help: Optional TOGA2 query_genes.bed (gene-level query coordinates; used to emit CESAR2 GFF lines).

tool.help:
**Phase C.4 merge annotation**
Merges a triage-accepted Liftoff projection with optional TOGA2/CESAR2 fallback projections into a single per-query annotation, and emits a flat per-gene classification table.
Ported from `Pv4-pangenome/v3/pipeline/impl/scripts/phase_c4_merge.py`.
-----
**Rules**
- Genes in the Liftoff-clean GFF3 -> `source=liftoff`, `intactness=I`. - Genes in the TOGA2 query annotation -> `source=cesar2`, intactness from the TOGA2 `loss_summary.tsv`. - Reference genes absent from both -> `source=none`, `intactness=M` (missing).
-----
**Liftoff-only pass 1 (Decision 12)**
The TOGA2/CESAR2 inputs are optional. With *Include TOGA2/CESAR2 fallback projections* set to **No**, the tool runs against an empty TOGA staging directory, so every projected gene is tagged `source=liftoff` and only the Liftoff-clean + missing rows appear. The output contract is unchanged.
-----
**Outputs**
- `{query}.annotation.gff3` - unified GFF3 (Liftoff entries decorated with `source`/`intactness`; CESAR2 BED-converted gene lines when TOGA2 supplied). - `{query}.classification.tsv` - flat table with columns: `reference_gene_id`, `query_gene_id`, `source`, `intactness`, `query_chrom`, `query_start`, `query_end`, `query_strand`, `orthology_class`.
